metadata.title: Rostand MIGAN | Full Stack Developer & Builder
metadata.description: Full stack developer. I write code the way I think clearly, efficiently, and always with the end user in mind. Lately, that's been a lot of fintech.

hero.bullet1: I'm a full stack developer, I build things that work : web apps, fintech tools, and ideas that refuse to stay in my head.
hero.bullet3_suffix: , an open-source platform for business management professionals in West Africa. Details below.
hero.cta: Have a project that needs to actually ship? Let's talk

about.title: About me
about.hook: Finance taught me how to read systems. Code taught me how to build them.
about.p1: At some point, analyzing wasn't enough ; I wanted to create. What pushed me over the edge? Open-source. In finance and business management, almost everything is closed, proprietary, static. Rigid software for industries that keep evolving. That convinced me something better was possible.
about.p2: In 2022, I taught myself to code. No bootcamp, no structured curriculum. Just curiosity, discipline, and a lot of broken projects before shipping real ones.
about.p3: What drives me now is a simple observation: the African market is massive, underequipped, and poorly served by tools built for somewhere else. That frustrates me ; and that frustration goes somewhere.
about.closing: I build open software that solves real problems, for real contexts.

stack.title: Stack
stack.statement: Every project has its context. My stack adapts.
stack.help: Available commands: help, ls, ls [category], ls --all, clear
stack.notFound: command not found. Type "help" for available commands

desc.wordpress: whatever CMS I'm in, I make it work

comptaopen.name: ComptaOpen
comptaopen.summary: Freemium platform centralizing accounting and tax resources, tools and information for business management professionals.
desc: Resources module : sharing and access to public management documents (theses, templates, legislation, exams)
Freemium system with member management, tiered access and subscription logic
Tools module : business calculators and utilities adapted to local tax realities
Articles module : editorial content on accounting and WAEMU taxation
Architecture designed to evolve into ComptaOpenLabs, a collaborative ERP built for accounting firms

gestiloc.name: Gestiloc.io
gestiloc.summary: Property management SaaS built for landlords and agencies ; everything in one place.
desc: Complete auth system : registration, email confirmation, password recovery and profile management
Multi-currency property and tenant management with strict business rules
Full lease lifecycle : creation, editing, status tracking and detailed visualization
Rich contract editor integrated directly into the platform
Admin panel built from scratch : dashboard, user management and full subscription handling

gmaps-scraper.name: GoogleMapsScrape
gmaps-scraper.summary: Extract thousands of prospects from Google Maps in just a few clicks.
desc: Bilingual interactive CLI (FR/EN) with 3 modes : targeted search, bulk scraping and data merging
Full listing extraction : name, rating, reviews, phone, website, address and more
Extended geographic coverage : 36,000+ French cities and preconfigured countries (Benin, Ivory Coast)
Library of 370+ business activity types to precisely target any industry
Structured CSV export with auto-calculated popularity score (rating x review count)
Star it, fork it, use it.

others.summary: I've also shipped several websites with Symfony and WordPress ; less flashy, but they're live and they work.
